name: Banana Pudding Splits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, process the yogurt on high speed for 30 seconds.
Add the pudding mix and process an additional minute, scraping down sides of the container as necessary.
2. Cut each banana into 6 diagonal slices and sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. Arrange 2 banana quarters into each of 4 goblets or dessert dishes.
Top each portion with 1/4 pudding mixture, then sprinkle with 1/4 of the pistachios.
Finish by topping each with 1 tablespoon whipped topping and 1 cherry.
